name: market-stall
summary: A single market stall under canvas. Display counter facing the street, storage behind. Specific to one vendor's goods.

primary_palette.note: produce / food vendor — baskets of goods
precious goods vendor — jeweler, spice trader

story_prompts: opening hour — vendor setting out the best goods
midday rush — goods half-gone, vendor busy
closing up — vendor loading unsold goods onto a handcart
abandoned stall — goods rotting, no vendor today
anti_patterns: keep it small — a stall is tiny compared to any shop
counter faces OUT to the street — not inward
don't fully enclose — canvas awning implied, one or two sides open
